verbatim_text: Think about policy iteration on optimization. For example, those used with reinforce, PPO, GRPO, for those of you who are aware of it. Now there are various knobs within this optimizer. And those also reflect the learned algorithm and its properties. And this talk is mostly about the training objective, but I'm happy to go into the details of this optimizer offline, like all the different knobs tuned. OK, so we have two parts, sampling and reward. Let's look at the reward part first.
